allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

PowerShell($folder = "D:\\Users\\Morii\\Desktop\\Twilight\\public\\assets\\music"; $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $f = $shell.Namespace\($folder\); $files = @\('稲葉曇,歌愛ユキ - リレイアウター.mp3','稲葉曇,彩澄しゅお,彩澄りりせ - 春難色.mp3','稲葉曇,歌愛ユキ - きみに回帰線.mp3','稲葉曇,歌愛ユキ - ロストアンブレラ.mp3','稲葉曇,弦巻マキ - ハルノ寂寞.mp3','稲葉曇,音街ウナ - 期待通り.mp3','ヰ世界情緒 - シリウスの心臓.flac','めらみぽっぷ - 竹ノ花.mp3','Virtual Self - Particle Arts.mp3','藍月なくる - 愛の残滓.mp3'\); foreach \($name in $files\) { $item = $f.ParseName\($name\); if \($item\) { $len = $f.GetDetailsOf\($item, 27\); Write-Output \($name + ' | ' + $len\) } else { Write-Output \($name + ' | NOT FOUND'\) } })

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "MP3 Virtual Self: status=%{http_code} ct=%{content_type} size=%{size_download}\\n" "http://127.0.0.1:4321/assets/music/Virtual%20Self%20-%20Particle%20Arts.mp3" -r 0-100)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "MP3 with comma: status=%{http_code} ct=%{content_type} size=%{size_download}\\n" "http://127.0.0.1:4321/assets/music/%E7%A8%B2%E8%91%89%E6%9B%87%2C%E6%AD%8C%E6%84%9B%E3%83%A6%E3%82%AD%20-%20%E3%83%AA%E3%83%AC%E3%82%A4%E3%82%A2%E3%82%A6%E3%82%BF%E3%83%BC.mp3" -r 0-100)
